repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
exerpts_tesim: Desinit: ܘܡܫ̈ܟܢܝ ܐܢܬܘܢ ܐܣܝܘܬܐ ܠܟܠܗܘܢ ܡܗܝ̈ܡܢܐ܀
Incipit mut.: ܟܕ ܐܬܡ̇ܢܥܬ. ܕܬܥܘܠ ܒܖ̈ܚܡܝܟ. ܠܡܕܝܢܬܐ ܩܕܝܫܬܐ ܡܪܐ ܕܟܘܠܐ.
contents_tesim: Desinit: ܘܡܫ̈ܟܢܝ ܐܢܬܘܢ ܐܣܝܘܬܐ ܠܟܠܗܘܢ ܡܗܝ̈ܡܢܐ܀
Incipit mut.: ܟܕ ܐܬܡ̇ܢܥܬ. ܕܬܥܘܠ ܒܖ̈ܚܡܝܟ. ܠܡܕܝܢܬܐ ܩܕܝܫܬܐ ܡܪܐ ܕܟܘܠܐ.
full_text_tesim: Desinit: ܘܡܫ̈ܟܢܝ ܐܢܬܘܢ ܐܣܝܘܬܐ ܠܟܠܗܘܢ ܡܗܝ̈ܡܢܐ܀
Incipit mut.: ܟܕ ܐܬܡ̇ܢܥܬ. ܕܬܥܘܠ ܒܖ̈ܚܡܝܟ. ܠܡܕܝܢܬܐ ܩܕܝܫܬܐ ܡܪܐ ܕܟܘܠܐ.
Iron gall and red ink are used in the text; occasionally green colour is used in rubrics (f. 51v onwards)
Melkite; 11th century, likely copied in the Monastery of St Elijah / St Panteleimon on the Black Mountain nr. Antioch.

Ornate vegetative headpieces, knotted vine motif, ref and green ink, ff. 67r, 86r, 98r, 116r, 163r, 177v, 195v; f. 202r, with ornamental head and tails | Minor geometric headpieces throughout, ff. 17r-199r
Ruling with hard point and lead pencil marking the borders of the writing area
